programmes.show_description: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1986!
Superstar hits from Diana Ross, Bon Jovi, Madonna and Prince with the American girl who grew up around them - Tiffany!
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
From the decade that invented the power ballad - non-stop love songs, back to back.
Sixty minutes of duets featuring love and heartbreak, with Phil & Marilyn, Cliff & Sarah, Marc & Gene, Elaine & Barbara and Dolly & Kenny.
From the decade that invented the power ballad - non-stop love songs, back to back.
The smooth laid-back sounds influenced by the US West Coast. With Toto, Christopher Cross, Hall & Oates, George Benson and Michael McDonald.
From the decade that invented the power ballad - non-stop love songs, back to back.
The soul of every story is in the song. Simon Bates presents the top 20 from across the decades, as chosen by you - each story is unique, each is different.
From the decade that invented the power ballad - non-stop love songs, back to back.
Todd Carty and Erkan Mustafa - otherwise known as Grange Hill's Tucker and Roland - host the ultimate school disco! But as they prop up the bar, will anyone else turn up?
A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
4 hours of bona fide classics from the best decade of music - every one of them made UK number 1. With rock, dance, new romantic, soul, pop and more!
'Double Album, 30 Great Tracks, including 11 Number Ones,' the first NOW album bragged back in 1983. We celebrate that historic moment with every video for every track - in order.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1983!
60 minutes of back-to-back number 1s from 1983 - including epics from The Police and Bonnie Tyler, plus a Christmas smash from Flying Pickets. With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
Sixty minutes of back to back US chart toppers from 1983 - some you might know well, some you might not! Including Toto, Dolly and Kenny, Men at Work and Michael Sembello.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1983!
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Adam Ant, Shalamar, Musical Youth, Rod Stewart & The Assembly.

programmes.show_description: Your '80s party channel - 24/7. Expect synth pop, soft rock, leg warmers, lycra and lots of big hair! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
Sixty minutes of action-packed songs from the biggest movie franchise of all time - 007 James Bond! 13 hits, From Her Majesty's Secret Service to The World Is Not Enough.

programmes.show_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go Go!
programmes.show_description: Your '80s party channel - 24/7. Expect synth pop, soft rock, leg warmers, lycra and lots of big hair! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
Food glorious food! The 70s & 80s were full of edible bands & songs, and TV chef Rustie Lee has raided the fridge & pantry to serve up pop's sweet treats. It's going to be a riot!
Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
Robin Banks with a mammoth singalong session of '80s anthems guaranteed to put you in the mood. From Belinda and Bananarama to Whitney and Wham! - a full-on decade of top tunes!
A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
Bruno Brookes flicks through the pages of another Yearbook. 1986 introduced us to Samantha Fox, Sinitta and Sigue Sigue Sputnik. But we also said a 'Final' goodbye to Wham!
...Heyward: Mr Favourite Shirts is back on NOW 80s, and this time he selects his Favourite Singers! Including some who influenced him the most, such as David Byrne and XTC's Andy Partridge.
